top_signals.title: Taiwan passes key crypto law, clearing legal uncertainty for digital asset sector
top_signals.summary: The law requires crypto platforms to obtain licenses from the Financial Supervisory Commission before operating.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: RBI’s Short Dollar Book Hit Record in May Before Policy Measures
top_signals.summary: The Reserve Bank of India’s short dollar book rose to a record $106.7 billion in May as the central bank used derivatives to defend the currency.

top_signals.title: The 1980s Garfield buyout that changed corporate finance
top_signals.summary: It was a conservative Catholic from the Nixon administration who launched the private equity industry
